overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character navigating a dystopian industrial shantytown at night. The environment features makeshift structures, shipping containers, and a large curved transparent architectural element, all rendered with a distinctive teal color grading and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with curved transparent canopy

events.description: moves from open area under curved structure into covered industrial overpass

agents.ego_description: running through industrial area, navigating around large curved architectural structures and concrete staircases

entered.detail: large curved transparent architectural canopy with ribbed metal framework
elevated concrete and metal highway overpass with support beams
wide concrete staircase leading up to elevated walkway
tall palm tree silhouetted against night sky
rusted metal safety railings along walkways

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive curved transparent structure in a dark industrial zone. The camera moves swiftly through the area, passing under an overpass and ascending concrete stairs. The environment is deserted, with only the sound of footsteps and ambient industrial noise.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shantytown with scattered shipping containers

events.description: exits covered industrial area into open shantytown with makeshift structures
curves around the large transparent structure, changing direction from forward to around the obstacle

agents.ego_description: navigating through the open wasteland area, running past abandoned vehicles and shipping containers while heading toward a distant lit tower

entered.detail: massive industrial tower emitting a bright cyan light beam into the sky
stacked colorful shipping containers used as makeshift buildings
corrugated metal and wood shacks with tarp roofs
rusted car wreck partially buried in dirt
large warehouse structure with corrugated metal walls

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial underpass, the scene opens into a wide shantytown wasteland. The ground is dirt and gravel, with makeshift structures and shipping containers scattered about. A massive tower with a blue light beam dominates the distant skyline. The camera circles around the curved transparent structure seen earlier, now viewing it from the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass entrance with bright lighting

events.description: approaching bright fluorescent lights under the overpass structure
two individuals come into view standing under the lights ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching two figures standing under bright lights in the underpass

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing under fluorescent lights, one appears to be bending over or examining something

entered.detail: concrete and metal overpass creating a covered tunnel effect
harsh white fluorescent tube lights illuminating the underpass
large red industrial dumpster with warning labels
shipping containers stacked overhead forming a bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a covered underpass area brightly lit by fluorescent lights. The environment shifts from open wasteland to a more enclosed space with shipping containers stacked overhead. Two NPCs become visible standing near a red dumpster, marking the first human presence in the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark storage corridor with metal shutters

events.description: passes the two NPCs and enters a dark indoor corridor
approaching a metal shutter door with red warning light

agents.ego_description: moving past the two individuals and proceeding into a dark narrow corridor with storage items

entered.detail: closed metal roll-up shutter door with horizontal slats
stacked cardboard boxes and storage containers
industrial metal shelving units with supplies
rough unfinished concrete corridor walls

segments.scene_description: Passing the two NPCs, the camera enters a dark, narrow corridor with concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lighting. The space appears to be a storage area with cardboard boxes and metal shelving. The segment ends as the camera approaches a metal shutter door marked with a red light.

events.description: exits dark corridor and ascends concrete stairs back to outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and continuing up a dirt hillside path surrounded by bushes and palm trees

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase leading upward
palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
dense bushes and scrub vegetation along the path
warm yellow lights from distant buildings on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark corridor, the camera ascends a flight of concrete stairs back into the open night air. The environment transitions to a natural hillside path with dirt ground, bushes, and palm trees. Distant building lights are visible on the horizon as the camera continues moving uphill.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate industrial zone that transitions from a sprawling shantytown into a narrow interior corridor before ending on a natural hillside. It begins by moving swiftly past a massive curved transparent structure and ascending concrete stairs, emerging from a dark underpass into a wide wasteland of dirt, shipping containers, and a distant tower emitting a blue light beam. As the camera circles the transparent architecture, the open terrain shifts into a brightly lit underpass where fluorescent lights illuminate stacked containers and two NPCs standing by a red dumpster. The scene then tightens into a dark, narrow storage corridor filled with cardboard boxes and metal shelving before passing a red-lit shutter door. Finally, the camera ascends another flight of stairs to exit the enclosure, moving from the concrete interior back into the open night air along a dirt path lined with bushes and palm trees.
